results.title: Donald Trump says $400 million White House ballroom will act as ‘shield’ against drones
results.description: President Trump announced that a new $400 million ballroom at the White House will serve as a protective shield against drone threats.

results.title: News channel journalist attacked with bottle in Tiruvarur, one held
results.description: P Haja Moideen (37), a resident of Mosque Street in Muthupettai, working as a journalist in a Tamil news channel, was approached by A Abdul Fazid (20), a person Haja is acquainted with, to discuss something important
